content: We can refactor the standard single-agent retrieval system into a distributed collaborative retrieval network where every external knowledge source is wrapped as a compliant A2A agent, replacing the static vector database lookup in traditional RAG with dynamic, negotiated knowledge retrieval across specialized A2A agents. This creates a system where knowledge providers can validate query intent, update information in real time, and decline out-of-scope requests rather than returning noisy irrelevant context that degrades LLM generation.
